response.justification: Bogdan has a broad technical background and genuine distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second), plus Staff-level tenure at Google, but he critically fails the most important minimum qualification: 8 years of C++ experience. His only professional C++ work is a ~6-month stint at National Instruments and a bachelor's-thesis project; C++ does not even appear in his listed skills. His career is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which are orthogonal to the role's core technical stack. Additionally, his experience sits firmly in application and product engineering rather than cloud compute infrastructure, and there is no evidence of sustained technical leadership over a cloud or DevOps engineering team.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency, async I/O design
Staff-level seniority at both Google and Altom with documented mentoring, workshops, and knowledge-sharing activities
Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and containerized deployment experience spread across multiple production roles
concerns: C++ experience totals roughly 6 months professionally against an 8-year hard minimum; C++ is absent from his own skills list
No cloud compute platform or infrastructure-layer ownership — all roles are application/product engineering at the service layer
No demonstrated 2+ years leading a cloud or DevOps engineering team, which is a preferred and practically necessary qualification for this leadership role
